overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a green dress walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and ascends illuminated stairs in a dense urban environment with towering digital billboards and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with elevated stairs and digital billboards

events.description: futuristic sedan vehicle passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: character in green dress walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a road, passing concrete stairs on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with blue neon edge lighting leading up to building entrance
large vertical billboard displaying pink and black checkered pattern with advertisements
tall building facade covered in green and purple neon lights and holographic displays
futuristic covered walkway bridge spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit city sidewalk at night, passing wide concrete stairs on the left. A futuristic vehicle drives past on the right while towering digital billboards and an elevated pedestrian bridge dominate the skyline ahead.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: character crossing the street at a crosswalk, moving from sidewalk to plaza area

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with yellow striped markings across the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection via a marked crosswalk, moving away from the concrete stairs toward the center of the street. The checkered billboard recedes into the distance while the elevated pedestrian bridge draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with illuminated stairs and advertising screens

events.description: character turns left toward the illuminated stairs while crossing the plaza

agents.ego_description: character turns left after crossing the street and walks toward a set of illuminated stairs, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two children running across the plaza path from right to left

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with embedded blue neon lights along each step edge
massive digital displays showing fashion advertisements and 'KEEP IT SAFE' text
trees decorated with colorful neon string lights and glowing ornaments

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character turns left into a spacious plaza dominated by large advertising screens and neon-lit trees. Two children run across the path as the character approaches a wide staircase illuminated with blue neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated stairway leading to upper plaza level

events.description: character begins ascending the illuminated concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: character climbing the wide illuminated stairs, moving from plaza level to upper building entrance

entered.detail: shiny wet or polished stone surface reflecting the blue neon lights from the stairs
modern glass and steel entrance structure at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide staircase with blue neon step lights, rising from the plaza toward an upper building entrance. The reflective plaza surface mirrors the neon glow while the advertising screens disappear from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a busy street-level sidewalk to an elevated building entrance. It begins with the character walking past concrete stairs as a futuristic vehicle speeds by, with towering digital billboards and an elevated pedestrian bridge looming ahead. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a wide urban intersection where they cross a marked crosswalk, leaving the checkered billboards behind as the pedestrian bridge draws closer. The camera then follows the character as they turn left into a spacious plaza filled with neon-lit trees and large advertising screens, passing two running children before approaching a wide, glowing staircase. Finally, the character ascends the blue neon-lit steps, rising away from the reflective plaza surface as the advertising screens disappear from view.
